title: JJ_00_EPICS Neon Enchant glint
description: Illuminate your enchanted gear with a radiant, pulsing neon glow that sets your items apart—sleek, vivid, and unmistakably eye-catching.
body:
# JJ_00_EPICS Neon glint assets
Bring your enchanted gear to life with a striking neon glow that turns ordinary enchantments into something extraordinary. Instead of the classic vanilla purple shimmer, this pack injects your tools, weapons, and armor with a glowing neon effect that feels futuristic, vibrant, and far more noticeable in combat or casual play. Whether you’re showing off enchanted diamond gear, flexing your netherite set, or simply carrying a neon-tinted pickaxe into the mines, the Neon Glint makes every item stand out like it belongs in a sci-fi arena.

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)
